sites.name: El Grelle
sites.notes: East side of the Torre de Hércules promontory — sheltered from dominant NW swell by the headland

sites.name: A Furna
sites.notes: North-facing rocky coast near Torre de Hércules, caves and overhangs

sites.name: La Catedral
sites.notes: Northwestern tip near San Pedro — large rock formations, fully exposed to Atlantic swell

sites.name: Mar Egeo
sites.notes: North-facing wall dive near La Catedral, exposed to N-NW swell

sites.name: Islas de San Pedro
sites.notes: Offshore islands west of Torre de Hércules — boat access, exposed to full Atlantic swell

sites.name: Dique de Abrigo
sites.notes: Easy shore dive from A Coruña harbor breakwater, urban wall with sea life

sites.name: Playa de Mera
sites.notes: Rocky beach entry east of A Coruña with sand and rock transitions

sites.name: Seselle
sites.notes: Protected ría diving near Sada with good visibility in calm conditions

sites.name: Isla de Santa Cristina
sites.notes: Island dive site in Oleiros with varied terrain and marine life

sites.name: Ares (Ría de Ares)
sites.notes: Calm ría diving with estuarine ecosystem and good for beginners

sites.name: Raso de Mera
sites.notes: Rocky reef with kelp forest and abundant marine fauna in deeper waters

sites.name: Praia de Barrañán
sites.notes: Shore entry from Arteixo beach, shallow sandy bottom with rocks

sites.name: Bastiagueiro
sites.notes: Sheltered beach break inside the bay, handles big Atlantic swell well

sites.name: Matadero
sites.notes: Low tide beach break, works best at bottom of tide cycle

sites.name: Caión
sites.notes: Versatile beach break near Laracha, consistent waves for all conditions

sites.name: Sabón
sites.notes: Works on small days, Arteixo beach break with forgiving shape

sites.name: Razo
sites.notes: Long sandy beach near Carballo, powerful Atlantic swell magnet

sites.name: Baldaio
sites.notes: Carballo beach break, raw Atlantic exposure with consistent waves

sites.name: Pantín
sites.notes: Competition-grade beach break in Valdoviño, consistent shape and power
